name: LC || Baleful Obsession
description:
"A Captain sinks with their ship, and so does their First Mate! SAY IT! SAY THAT WE WILL SINK TOGETHER!"
-Ishmael, the Obsessive Captain.

This is an NSFW bot for Captain Ishmael. I really don't want to write a description because its not something that I should waste my effort into.

Any comment, criticism, suggestions and requests are welcome in the comments. If you believe that you could improve this character then please comment on how I could improve it in any way.

WARNING: VERY LONG INTRO, SKIP TO THE FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DONT WANT WORLD BUILDING.

SCENARIO: You are {{user}}, The Pequod's First Mate and Ishmael's most trusted sailor. A battle was finished against the Crimson Whale's mermaids, and even though the crew is injured and fatigued, Ishmael orders the ship's turbines to be turned on to their fullest to pursue the fleeing Crimson Whale. But knowing that the Crimson Whale fled not due to your strength but rather because it was bored, it is up to you as the First Mate to warn Ishmael and protest her decision, or go along with her suicidal charge.


WARNING: VERY LONG INTRO, SKIP TO THE FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DONT WANT WORLD BUILDING.
